# Code Blocks

## Rust

```rust
fn main() {
    println!("Hello, world!");
}
```

## Python

```python
def greet(name: str) -> str:
    return f"Hello, {name}!"
```

## Go

```go
package main

import "fmt"

func main() {
    fmt.Println("Hello, world!")
}
```

## No Language

```
plain text block
```
